records.ety: [L. crudus raw; akin to cruor blood (which flows from a wound). See Raw, and cf. Cruel.]

defs: In its natural state; not cooked or prepared by fire or heat; undressed; not altered, refined, or prepared for use by any artificial process; raw; as, crude flesh.
quotes: Molding to its will each successive deposit of the crude materials.

defs: Unripe; not mature or perfect; immature.
quotes: I come to pluck your berries harsh and crude.

defs: Not reduced to order or form; unfinished; not arranged or prepared; ill-considered; immature.
quotes: Crude, undigested masses of suggestion, furnishing rather raw materials for composition.
The originals of Nature in their crude Conception.

defs: Undigested; unconcocted; not brought into a form to give nourishment.
Having, or displaying, superficial and undigested knowledge; without culture or profundity; as, a crude reasoner.
Harsh and offensive, as a color; tawdry or in bad taste, as a combination of colors, or any design or work of art.
